text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't even call it a problem. I'm thinking about how I can make
the Ligne Droite an event meant purely for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm... But right now it isn't?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not exactly. It seems I'll only be making myself happy in the end. Gathering everyone for a grand dance... wouldn't be right if I'm the only one beaming with pride.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Are you certain about that? Isn't it rather that you should be satisfied with yourself before considering anything else?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
However hard you try, everyone will feel differently about the event
afterward. That's why the only thing we can really do is... give the
best performance we can.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You don't really believe you can make someone else's heart dance
without being thrilled yourself, do you? You have to show your own
enthusiasm first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Fuji Kiseki. Excuse me—there's something I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Of course. Good luck! ...I'll always be here to help you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right... You can come out now, Shakur. I know you heard all that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: More like I was forced to listen. Just what are you scheming?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Scheming? Why does everyone think I'm so manipulative? I only
figured it was a good chance to convince you since you were here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The Droit this year is going to be a hit. If you have time after this, come see how our dance is going... I'm positive you'll love it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, she's a real mastermind. Tch... So it's true. Someone really
knew about my account.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(So you're using that as an excuse to get me in the Droit. Ugh... You
really know how to be a pain. All for... "memories," was it?)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much for helping me study! Now I'm sure I won't have to
take a makeup exam!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I didn't help at all. You were the ones who came to me asking... Why
are you two fools so happy anyway?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text:
You're so mean! But, you know, the school year's almost over, right? I
started thinking about how I should prepare more...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Cowards looking for a safety net make me sick. If you're not brave
enough to be honest, I won't bother with you next time.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
We can't help thinking, though. About not having regrets... preparing
for whatever might happen... wanting to make memories... That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez... I sound like a loser! Anyway, we gotta get going. See you
later!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
That's a weakness. Just push your regrets down. Don't cling to the
past...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Matters of the heart are never simple. It seems we've both become
too hardened.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So? What'd you bring me here for? Don't tell me you've come crying
for help again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've come to try asking you once more. Sirius Symboli, I need your
help.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I concede your point. I thought a grand celebration of everyone's
milestone would make them happy. That was... simply my ego.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Then why are you asking for my help again? If you understand it was
all about your own ego, then—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's stubbornness. I'm just going to say it—I want to be happy with this. I want to mold it all into a result I can be satisfied with. I want everything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need your assistance. You know how far my voice can
carry an idea. But there are limits to where it reaches. And thus...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You'd stoop to using me. You really need to stop disrespecting
people.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But all right. I'll pitch in. Not like I can stop anyone from going
anyway. Remember, this is in no way for your approval or for my
followers' sakes.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Think of it as a reward for admitting your arrogance. Enjoy it, Emperor
Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let me add that I do want you to come as well. You're just as important a student as anyone at Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah, what was that? I'd never accept such a pitiful invitation.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ohh! The prim and proper emperor must not know how to make a good invitation. How about I teach you some tricks of the trade?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wasn't it me who used to teach you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You won't get another chance. Give me your hand, Sirius. I'll continue
our lesson where we left off.

text_block_list.name: Young Rudolf
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... One, two, three... Good, you're really getting it.

text_block_list.name: Young Sirius
text_block_list.text:
...Heh, I knew it! Hey, I'm going to get even better—because I'm the
only one who can give you what you want!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you never managed to forget what I taught you. Following my
lead seems to suit you better.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Just shut up and let me lead already!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well... You know, it's strange. Dancing with you now is much
more... fun.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Acting like everything comes so easy... That attitude of hers has always pissed
me off.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, how long do you plan on hiding? Nobody likes a peeping Tom.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, u-um, you're dancing was just... too amazing! I got all confused
and thought I was in a palace ballroom...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Spare me. What do you want?
